source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open HooliCalendar, the calendar app at http://localhost:3017 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Open the event 'New York City - UCB Improv Workshop Weekend Intensive' (early June) and add a guest/attendee with the email casting.scout.dundie7731@improv.test
